start_cue: Pick one platform to start. An actively optimized single-app profile outperforms three neglected ones.

weeks.detail: Nothing else matters until the photo stack exists. Choose one route: solo with tripod, friend with phone, or professional photographer. Outdoor natural light, golden hour, 50–100 frames of the primary face shot. Capture the full six-photo stack (face, body, social, activity, style, warmth) in the same week. Do not go live yet.

weeks.focus: Select, sequence, write bio, go live
weeks.detail: Choose the primary face photo — the one that reads most clearly as a face at thumbnail size, not the one that's 'best' at full size. Sequence the other five to cover, in order: full body or three-quarter frame, a social or context shot with friends, an activity shot showing you doing something real, a style shot, and a warmth or personality photo. Draft one bio in a single sitting: specific, lightly self-aware, no defensive language. For Hinge, three concrete slightly-unexpected prompt answers. Launch, and resist changing anything for the rest of the week.

weeks.focus: First full testing window — do not touch it
weeks.detail: Two weeks is the minimum window for any conclusion. The instinct to adjust after three days is the largest source of A/B testing contamination. Do not change photos or bio. Do not buy premium boosts. Do not ask for friend feedback. Let the data accumulate.

weeks.focus: Test one variable at a time
weeks.detail: Apply the A/B testing rules. Bottleneck order: primary photo quality, absence of a full-body photo, generic bio, photo variety. Change one variable, wait two weeks, evaluate match-to-conversation conversion (not raw swipes). Three to four two-week cycles produces a meaningfully better profile than daily tweaking ever does.

graduation: When match-to-conversation conversion stabilizes and profile changes no longer produce meaningful shifts, the profile has reached its useful ceiling. Further returns come from conversation quality, first-message discipline, and the underlying appearance variables the rest of the system addresses — not from more profile tweaks.
